sources.title: Kill or Be Killed | Outlaw Western Heist Movie | Full Action Thriller
sources.description:
Kill or Be Killed | Outlaw Western Heist Movie | Full Action Thriller

In the autumn of 1900, outlaw Claude Barbee puts his 'retirement plan' in action, attempting to lead his train-robbing gang across Texas to recover a cash stash hidden after a botched railroad heist.
2015.  Stars: Justin Meeks, Paul McCarthy-Boyington, Gregory Kelly

metadata.Plot: In the autumn of 1900, outlaw Claude Barbee puts his 'retirement plan' in action, attempting to lead his train-robbing gang across Texas to recover a cash stash hidden after a botched railroad heist. They soon discover they're being hunted by more than just the law - but rather a merciless, unexpected evil quite possibly greater than themselves.
metadata.Actors: Justin Meeks, Paul McCarthy-Boyington, Gregory Kelly
